creator: freebsd@charles.lecklider.org
text:
Created attachment 226433
screenshot of trap

As in #257149, I changed the default to i586, built world+kernel twice in a VM, did installkernel over nfs.

Hopefully the screenshot will mean something to someone. The following is dmesg from 11.4:
